title: Meetings & Notes
desc: Schedule meetings with anyone in the group, notify them, and keep the agenda, minutes, decisions and action items in one thread.
note: The owner/super-admin schedules; every invited employee is notified via an ADDRESSED notification (db.notify with toId → db.inbox()) and can RSVP. Ordinary employees see only the meetings they organise or are invited to; Rooms & Setup is admin-only.

bridge.note: Meetings record no money, so this module raises no bridge events — nothing to roll up to the Group books.
